description_long: This is a tall, slim aluminum can with a dark, nearly black background and bold, modern graphics in green and white. The can features a large, abstract green teardrop shape with white circular accents, wrapping around the body. One side displays the brand name 'artsmedia' in white, accompanied by the phrase 'muove idee' in bright green. A barcode and a nutritional information panel are visible on the back, along with additional product details in white text. The top of the can is metallic silver with a standard pull tab opening. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or vending machines.
description: A tall, slim dark can with green and white abstract graphics, silver pull tab top, and modern branding. Features a visible nutritional panel and barcode.
description_view_0: The can's side shows the nutritional information panel, barcode, and part of the green abstract graphic.
description_view_1: This view highlights the green teardrop graphic wrapping around the can, with the barcode and product details partially visible.
description_view_2: The front displays the 'artsmedia muove idee' branding in white and green on a dark background.
description_view_3: The can's side features the large green teardrop graphic with white circles, with no text visible.
